title: Marketplace Manager - The Man Company Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - The Man Company Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with The Man Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About The Man Company Digital Technologies:
The Man Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company Digital Technologies!
